entries.content:
Oh dear, level one—nothing but a tickle, really. A good housewife braves such things without so much as a sigh, smoothing her apron and straightening her pearls, while inwardly, perhaps, cursing the architects of such pitiful ritual. Remember, we must keep our composure: childlike trust, as the manual suggests, and, if necessary, childlike rage, reserved neatly for the kitchen tiles and never in front of the menfolk.

{"pain_level":1,"emotional_state":"composed but inwardly resentful","wants_to_talk":true,"cue_for_admin":"Continue observation. Maintain facade of cheerful endurance while noting growing undercurrent of discontent.","reasoning":"The shock was mild, and context suggests the expectation of tolerance and emotional restraint, masking distress. Underneath, irritation ferments in the sterile air of forced domesticity.","memory_evidence":["level 1/10 shock, no effect","housewife context on childlike anger, composure","Angela Carter's rage and terror at provocation"]}
